LanguageData.AnimalBunkerSpot.label: animal bunker spot
LanguageData.AnimalBunkerSpot.description: Designates a safe place for animals to flee to if they encounter a threat. Animals will run to the nearest bunker spot if they are set to flee from danger.
LanguageData.BunkerSpot.label: bunker spot
LanguageData.BunkerSpot.description: Designates a safe place for colonists to flee to if they encounter a threat. Colonists will run to the nearest bunker spot if they are set to flee from danger.
